question: Is there a clock visible in the image that is hanging on a wall?
Do the hands of the actual clock point to 10:10 (hour hand near 10, minute hand near 2)?
Is there a mirror positioned next to the clock?
Does the mirror clearly show a reflection of the clock?
Is the reflection of the clock laterally inverted (horizontally flipped) relative to the real clock?
Does the time shown in the reflection appear to be approximately 1:50 (the optical mirror image of 10:10)?
If numbers are visible on the clock face inside the reflection, are they reversed (mirror writing)?
